name: calendar-oauth-connect
description: Calendar_OAuth_Connect — scheduling sub-phase E Task E11 (WS-E-OAUTH backend). The per-coordinator Google Calendar 3LO consent flow behind the WS-D3 staging.schedule.myrecruiter.ai CloudFront distribution (Function URL origin). Routes: GET /connect (verify an HMAC init-token minted by the Clerk-authed dashboard backend → build the Google consent URL with a signed state, access_type=offline + prompt=consent, scope-minimized to calendar.events + calendar.freebusy per D2 → 302 to Google), GET /oauth/callback (verify state → exchange code for a refresh_token via the platform OAuth app → write the per-coordinator secret in the SHIPPED oauth-client.js shape + additive calendar_id/connected_at → fire the B5 Calendar_Watch_Onboarder → redirect back to the dashboard), GET /connection/status (probe the stored refresh_token; invalid_grant → mark the secret revoked + report bookable:false; 5xx → stale-connected). Coordinator identity comes ONLY from the signed init-token, never client params — calendar-slot poisoning is structurally impossible. Function URL + CloudFront routing + IAM + the init-token mint are the integrator's glue.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
